acceptance_criteria:
1. try_type_renderer looks up by type key
2. renderer_key_for_type handles Class and Enum
3. execute_renderer dispatches Jinja vs Func
4. execute_jinja_renderer builds context correctly
5. Context includes value (typed) and ctx (session)
6. Proper error conversion
7. Integration test: type-level renderer is invoked
8. cargo test passes
title: Implement type-level renderer lookup and execution

acceptance_criteria: baml-types Cargo.toml has optional clap dep; generator builds without clap by default; enabling feature restores clap ValueEnum; cargo check passes.
description: Avoid pulling clap by default by gating ValueEnum impl behind a feature; keep generator types usable without clap.
title: Make baml-types generator clap optional
